name: ultronos-desktop
description: Ultronos AI agent command dashboard — desktop edition
author: Dima

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3100 && npm run build:electron && cross-env ULTRONOS_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 electron .
scripts.build:renderer: cd renderer && npx next build && node ../scripts/copy-static.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
